Specially Appearing Defendant All Inclusive Collection, Llc' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Plaintiff' Summons And Complaint For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-04-2020 Continued To Dec-04-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Wertheim, Esq. 415-775-8950 for Plaintiff.
Paul White, Esq. 213-362-7777 of Yukevich Cavanaugh for Specially Appearing DEFENDANT ALL INCLUSIVE COLLECTION.

RULING - A R G U E D. The matter is passed on the first calling of the case due to technical difficulties. At 10:20 am, the matter is recalled. Both sides argued. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Specially Appearing DEFENDANT ALL INCLUSIVE COLLECTION, LLC's Motion To Quash Service Of Plaintiff' Summons And Complaint For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction.

Continued to 12/4/20 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 for jurisdictional discovery. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
